svg.title: Two-stage crash prediction pipeline with merged inputs to stage two
svg.desc: End-to-end pipeline: user input flows into Stage 1 traffic volume estimation. Stage 2 takes both the original user input and the estimated traffic volume from Stage 1 as inputs to predict crash counts. Outputs include crash count and extreme weather ablation.

g.text: 177 ZIP one-hots + temporal + weather + 7 target encodings (206-d) → log traffic v̂ᵢ
User input features + estimated traffic volume from Stage 1 (200-d) → ŷᵢ via log link
Each extreme weather flag on vs off
